series_metadata.series_title: Annual Survey of Health Care Delivery Gr
series_metadata.series_description: These surveys/reports provide information related to Long Term Care Facilities (ASLTCF), Home Health Agencies (HHA), and Hospitals (DRG = Diagnosis Related Group). Includes information about the name of the facility/group/ , number of beds, its services,

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office area for 5 years then destroy ; Paper: Retain in office area for 3 years, transfer to State Records Center for 1 year, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
